In terIs of Order Iذ Rule "C٢C" Wher dismissed ٩١٥٥٨١٨٢ ٨ ٨ ٨ prosecution of plainiff while invoking the provisions of Rule the plaintifT is though precluded Io institute fresh in respect ofithe same cause ofaction but he apply for an order to set the dismissal aside ifhe satisfies the ٢ ١ that there was sufficient cause for his nonappearance Well the suit was called on for The cnurt on such an application legal R147, ا801 50[ hearint الاخا قذخحتسسفن can make an order setting aside the dismissal upon such terms as 00513 otherwise thinks Iit As already observed that suit was carlier dismissed for want of prosecution on 28 " January, 20I4 but it was restored on the basis conceding statement of the petitioner and respondents No 2 to through 0FUCT Ualed 19 January, 2016 subزet 00515 000 -_ not disputed thal 0515 1/#5 ٢ ١ٹ respondents No I(i) to I(iv ) Even no application exlens10n 0f III for the puyment uf cusls was eVLT Inoved by Ihe said [eSpOIUeIIS.
